name: Taiwan Hon Chuan Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Hon Chuan Enterprise Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells beverage packaging materials for beverage manufacturers in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers aluminum, plastic, and metal lug caps; PET bottles/perform products, label products, and tobacco and liquor packaging products; caps, bottles, and labelling production equipment; and LDPE shrinkable films. It also provides hot fill beverage, aseptic beverage, and bottled water filling OEM services. The company was formerly known as Hon Chuan Metal Development Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Taiwan Hon Chuan Enterprise Co., Ltd. in 1999. Taiwan Hon Chuan Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.
